name: Orb
description: Shaded spheres with a soft highlight, each ball re-colouring smoothly on every seed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 82%; height: 82%; margin: 9%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); box-shadow: inset -8px -8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), inset 8px 8px 16px rgba(255,255,255,0.45); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 24%; top: 18%; @size: 26%; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
